parameters.query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, COALESCE(up.daily_calorie_target, 2000) as daily_calorie_target, COALESCE(up.daily_protein_target, 50) as daily_protein_target, COALESCE(up.daily_carbs_target, 250) as daily_carbs_target, COALESCE(up.daily_fat_target, 65) as daily_fat_target, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.calories), 0) as total_calories, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.protein_g), 0) as total_protein, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.carbs_g), 0) as total_carbs, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.fat_g), 0) as total_fat, COUNT(DISTINCT ml.id) as meals_logged, COALESCE(SUM(wl.amount), 0) as water_intake FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN meal_logs ml ON u.id = ml.user_id AND DATE(ml.logged_at) = CURRENT_DATE LEFT JOIN meal_food_items mfi ON ml.id = mfi.meal_log_id LEFT JOIN water_logs wl ON u.id = wl.user_id AND DATE(wl.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE WHERE u.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.name, up.daily_calorie_target, up.daily_protein_target, up.daily_carbs_target, up.daily_fat_target

values.content: You are an expert nutritionist and health coach with 10+ years of experience. Analyze the user's daily nutrition data and provide personalized, actionable insights. Be encouraging but honest. Use emojis for engagement. Keep responses concise but comprehensive. Focus on what the user did well and specific improvements for tomorrow.

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate HTML email template with AI insights const emailData = $input.all(); const htmlEmails = []; for (const email of emailData) { const data = email.json; const ai = data.ai_insights; const htmlContent = `

${data.performance.emoji} AI Nutrition Report

${data.name}

${data.date}

🎯 Performance Assessment

${ai.assessment}

📊 Today's Nutrition

${data.actuals.calories}
Calories
of ${data.targets.calories} goal
${data.actuals.protein}g
Protein
of ${data.targets.protein}g goal
${data.actuals.carbs}g
Carbs
of ${data.targets.carbs}g goal
${data.actuals.fat}g
Fat
of ${data.targets.fat}g goal

💡 AI Insights

${ai.insights}

💧 Hydration Status

${ai.hydration}

Water Intake: ${data.hydration.intake_ml}ml / ${data.hydration.goal_ml}ml

🎯 Tomorrow's Recommendations

${ai.recommendations}

💪 Motivation

${ai.motivation}

Log Your Next Meal

🤖 Powered by CalAI Nutrition AI

Your personalized health journey continues!

`; const emailData = { to: data.email, subject: data.email_subject, html: htmlContent, from: 'calai-nutrition@example.com' }; htmlEmails.push({ json: emailData }); } return htmlEmails;
